cleavage agent: the biotinylated proteins were transferred to on-bead digestion process by trypsinization.
enrichment method: we used APEX proximity labelling to explore the impact of rG4 availability on the SG proteome.
fragmentation method: Data was acquired in data-dependent acquisition (DDA) mode, using a Top10 method.
instrument: coupled online through a nanoESI emitter (10 um tip; New Objective; Woburn, MA, USA) to a quadrupole orbitrap mass spectrometer (Q Exactive Plus, Thermo Scientific)
ionization type: coupled online through a nanoESI emitter (10 um tip; New Objective; Woburn, MA, USA)
labeling: The label-free quantification (LFQ) algorithm in MaxQuant was utilized to compare experimental samples
